sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2311" key="ai)qeriw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰθεριώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n2311.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αἰθερώδης, φύσις</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
